pages.text:
0 10:0409896

November 25, 1996

Hon. Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France

Direction

Generale des

Affaires

Politiques et

Securite

Direction des Nations

Unies et des organisations Internationales 37 quai d'Orsay

10 DEC. 1996

Dear Sir,

I have the honour

to advise you that the Cooperative

republic of Guyana has decided to become a member of the Office

International des

Epizooties.

The Government of the Cooperative Republic of Guyana has

examined the provisos

, of the International Agreement and of the

Internal statutes of 25 Januarfice under

1924, and agrees to participate in

costs of

the conditions

engecially with regard in Article 32 of the International Agreoment and Article 11 of the Internal Statutes.

The 6th contribution category has been selected by my

Government.

The official Delegate of the Cooperative

Republic of

Guyana to

the OIE will

be Dr. Lennox Applewhaite who is the Chief

Crops and

livestock Officer (aq).

Yours sincerely,

Clement ..

Rohee

Senior Minister of Foreign

Affairs

cc:

Dr. Jean Blancor

Director General, OI 12 rue de Prony 75017 Paris

France
